data.content:
Implementation review approved

Reviewed branch codex/4b66-stale-beats-overview at commit da0b66f7 against main. The implementation matches the knot scope: StaleBeatDialogTrigger now accepts the Button prop surface, spreads DialogTrigger asChild props into Button, and keeps local styling/count badges intact. This restores the missing Radix click handler without undoing the recent dispatch-helper refactor.

Test coverage is appropriate for the regression: src/stories/stale-beat-grooming-dialog.stories.tsx runs in the Storybook chromium project, clicks stale-beats-dialog-trigger, and verifies stale-beat-grooming-dialog is visible.

Sanity gates passed during implementation: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run test:storybook, bun run build. No invariants, security issues, or regressions found.
